title: Blocksistency
description: A vanilla-friendly mod that completes Minecraft's block sets by adding missing, logical variants for builders
body:
![Blocksistency](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fa5f8b3e77c3977994ebc76d4783d4b4f6c704b3.png)

![Available for Fabric](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/513035d1231a86dff137c74e04a5e64633593f10.png)
![Environment: both](https://img.shields.io/badge/environment-both-4caf50?style=for-the-badge)

[![GitHub repo](https://img.shields.io/badge/github-repo-blue?logo=github&style=for-the-badge)](https://github.com/muhammadrizo-y/blocksistency)
[![GitHub issues](https://img.shields.io/badge/github-issues-brightgreen?logo=github&style=for-the-badge)](https://github.com/muhammadrizo-y/blocksistency/issues)
[![GitHub wiki](https://img.shields.io/badge/github-wiki-orange?logo=github&style=for-the-badge)](https://github.com/muhammadrizo-y/blocksistency/wiki)
![PRs Welcome](https://img.shields.io/badge/PRs-welcome-brightgreen.svg?style=for-the-badge)

A vanilla-friendly mod that completes Minecraft's block sets by adding missing, logical variants for builders

Read the [wiki](https://github.com/muhammadrizo-y/blocksistency/wiki) for the full list of all block sets and crafting recipes 

## Features:

### Block sets:

<details>
<summary>Currently supported block sets</summary>

- [Stone](https://github.com/muhammadrizo-y/blocksistency/wiki/Block-Sets-List#stone)
- [Granite](https://github.com/muhammadrizo-y/blocksistency/wiki/Block-Sets-List#granite)
- [Diorite](https://github.com/muhammadrizo-y/blocksistency/wiki/Block-Sets-List#diorite)
- [Andesite](https://github.com/muhammadrizo-y/blocksistency/wiki/Block-Sets-List#andesite)
- [Deepslate](https://github.com/muhammadrizo-y/blocksistency/wiki/Block-Sets-List#deepslate)
- [Bricks](https://github.com/muhammadrizo-y/blocksistency/wiki/Block-Sets-List#bricks)
- [Sandstone](https://github.com/muhammadrizo-y/blocksistency/wiki/Block-Sets-List#sandstone)
- [Red Sandstone](https://github.com/muhammadrizo-y/blocksistency/wiki/Block-Sets-List#red-sandstone)
- [Nether Bricks](https://github.com/muhammadrizo-y/blocksistency/wiki/Block-Sets-List#nether-bricks)
- [Crimson (Red) Nether Bricks](https://github.com/muhammadrizo-y/blocksistency/wiki/Block-Sets-List#crimson-nether-bricks)
- [Warped Nether Bricks (*new)](https://github.com/muhammadrizo-y/blocksistency/wiki/Block-Sets-List#warped-nether-bricks)

<details>
<summary>🔜</summary>

More block sets coming very soon!

</details>

</details>

### Built-in datapacks:

Built-in datapacks can be toggled per-world. Both are on by default.

<details>
<summary>Better Recipes</summary>

Modifies vanilla recipes for consistency and more output
- Buttons give 4 instead 1
- Doors give 6 instead 3
- Fences give 4 instead of 3
- Fence Gates give 2 instead of 1
- Hanging Signs are now crafted from Planks instead of Stripped Logs
- Pressure Plates give 8 instead of 1
- Shelves are now crafted from Planks instead of Stripped Logs
- Signs now give 6 instead of 3
- Stairs now give 6 instead of 4
- Trapdoors now give 12 instead of 2

***

- The recipe for crafting the Stonecutter now accepts the `#c:stones` tag in place of Stone

</details>

<details>
<summary>Cobbled Drops</summary>

You can choose whether newly added `Cobbled` blocks drop from their base block. If you turn it off, you can still get them from the Stonecutter.

</details>

## Installation

**🛠️ INSTALLATION REQUIRED ON BOTH CLIENT AND SERVER**

**📦 REQUIRES [FABRIC API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) TO BE INSTALLED**

## Issues

Feel free to report bugs and make feature requests: [GitHub issues](https://github.com/muhammadrizo-y/blocksistency/issues)
